joinery_bench.source: Young (JM-0004) floor-plan extraction — PROVISIONAL. No QS joinery bench available yet; window dims/rooms are read from the floor-plan W×H callouts (H×W order, per the 15A/O'Neil convention) and the slider/entry from the Route 2 + entry paths. Verify against the QS before treating as canonical. Authored to exercise the datum-strength gate fix (Young's 1920 room-depth datum must NOT veto the symbol path).
joinery_bench.note: No garage on this plan (no GARAGE label). The 1920mm 'datum' is the repeated room DEPTH of Bath/WC/Laundry (2970×1920, 1010×1920, 1670×1920 = room footprints, NOT openings) — the weak-datum false positive this fixture guards against. glazed=true for all (no sectional_door). window_count counts window/slider (no garage_window; entry excluded). Entry door is the unlabelled 860 leaf → recovered as a flagged PORCH-anchored entry with asserted 2.1m height, width provisional.

openings.note: unlabelled 860 entry leaf; anchored on 'PORCH AREA:' label, width provisional (no frame-to-frame on plan)

weak_datum_phantoms.explanation: Bath/WC/Laundry room widths at the repeated 1920mm room depth — must be discarded, not surfaced as openings.
